mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_water_standard ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM tb_water_standard ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_water_standard WHERE item_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_water_standard WHERE item_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_water_standard (item_name, unit, min_value, max_value, remark, reg_user, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{itemName}, #{unit}, #{minValue}, #{maxValue}, #{remark}, #{regUser}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_water_standard SET item_name = #{itemName}, unit = #{unit}, min_value = #{minValue}, max_value = #{maxValue}, remark = #{remark}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
